reference: I am a fifty-one-year-old woman of average weight and size. Over the past few weeks, my abdomen has become extremely distended to the point where I can barely bend over to tie my shoes. I am fatigued and have a general feeling of malaise. I have constant pain across the middle of my back and some breathing difficulty. When I bend over, I have pain in my lower abdomen. I do not have gas or a urinary tract infection. My doctor says the distention is unexplained and is sending me for an X-ray and ultrasound. What could this be?
text: Prius 1.5-litraisen bensiinimoottorin voima välitetään vain etupyörille. Nelivetoisen Hybrid Synergy Driven toteutus poikkeaa toisen Toyota-malliston mallin Prius+ ja Prius Plug-in Hybrid -malleista, sillä Priuksen neliveto toteutetaan mekaanisesti. Lisäksi Hybrid X -versiossa nelivetojärjestelmänä käytetään 1,5-litraisen bensiinimoottorin yhteydessä.
